scenarios.purpose: Compare the discoverable S01 command surface and successful help behavior.

stdout.raw:
ralph - Executor de loop de tarefas PRD
USO
  ralph <comando> [opcoes]

WORKSPACE
  ralph init [--force]                  Inicializa o workspace .ralph/ no diretorio atual
  ralph clean [--force]                 Remove o workspace .ralph/
  ralph doctor [--yes|--non-interactive]
                                        Verifica workspace, PRD, engines e PATH

EXECUCAO DE TAREFAS
  ralph run|loop [opcoes]               Executa tarefas pendentes do PRD em loop
  ralph once [tarefa] [opcoes]          Executa uma tarefa do PRD ou tarefa avulsa
  ralph parallel [tarefa ...] [opcoes]  Executa tarefas em paralelo
  ralph status [--json]                 Mostra status atual do workspace/run
  ralph events [--follow]               Acompanha .ralph/events.jsonl
  ralph checkpoint <create|list|show|restore>
                                        Gerencia checkpoints leves de execucao
  ralph context <refresh|show>          Gera/mostra .ralph/context/repo-map.md
  ralph adapters <list|new>             Lista ou cria adapters de engine
  ralph recipes <list|new>              Lista ou cria receitas de workflow

OPCOES DE EXECUCAO
  --prd CAMINHO                         Caminho do PRD (padrao: PRD.md)
  --engine NOME                         Engine ou adapter a usar
  --model NOME                          Override de modelo
  --sonnet | --opus | --haiku           Atalhos de modelos Claude
  --mode loop|wiggum                    Modo de contexto do prompt
  --loop | --wiggum                     Atalhos para --mode
  --force                               Mantem supervisor rodando ate concluir ou pedir revisao
  -r, --retries N | --max-retries N     Maximo de tentativas por tarefa
  --retry-delay SEC                     Segundos entre tentativas
  --max-iterations N                    Para apos N iteracoes
  --max-parallel N                      Maximo de workers no modo parallel
  --retry-failed                        Reexecuta falhas do parallel uma vez
  --parallel-integration merge|create-pr|no-merge
                                        Estrategia de integracao apos parallel
  --max-tokens N                        Limite de tokens enviado para a engine
  --temperature T                       Temperatura enviada para a engine
  --run-tests                           Executa test_command do PRD quando declarado
  --skip-tests                          Pula test_command do PRD
  --no-lint | --skip-lint               Pula lint_command do PRD
  --gate nome=comando                   Executa quality gate explicito apos cada tarefa
  --test-command CMD                    Alias para --gate test=CMD
  --lint-command CMD                    Alias para --gate lint=CMD
  --fast                                Ativa fast mode do Codex via config quando suportado
  --no-commit                           Pula commit/branch/PR do fluxo PRD
  --security safe|auto|dangerous        Perfil de seguranca da engine
  --sandbox | --no-sandbox              Ativa ou desativa sandbox de processo
  --sandbox-provider NOME               process, docker ou podman
  --sandbox-image IMAGE                 Imagem para sandbox docker/podman
  --sandbox-network MODO                Modo de rede do container
  --dry-run                             Mostra previa sem executar a engine
  --debug-engine-json                   Salva snapshots brutos da engine
  --verbose | -v                        Mostra prompt, stdout e tempo
  --branch-per-task                     Cria uma branch git por tarefa
  --base-branch NOME                    Branch base para branches de tarefa
  --create-pr | --draft-pr              Abre PRs no GitHub apos tarefas
  --auto-rollback                       Reverte mudancas da tarefa em falha
  --ignore-context-stops                Ignora sinais DEFER/GUTTER (padrao)
  --respect-context-stops               Para em sinais DEFER/GUTTER
  --no-change-policy fallback|retry|fail-fast
                                        Comportamento quando nao houver alteracoes
  --no-change-max-retries N             Maximo de tentativas sem alteracoes
  --no-change-stop-on-max-retries       Para apos maximo sem alteracoes
  --no-change-continue-on-max-retries   Continua apos maximo sem alteracoes
  -- ...args                            Passa argumentos restantes direto para a engine

TASKS
  ralph tasks list|next|done|sync        Gerencia tarefas do PRD e sync de issues GitHub

CONFIG, RULES, LOGS, RELATORIOS
  ralph config list|get|set              Gerencia configuracao
  ralph rules list|add|clear             Gerencia guardrails
  ralph logs tail [--follow]             Acompanha logs de execucao
  ralph report last                      Mostra ultimo relatorio

INSTALACAO, UPDATE, IDIOMA E UI
  ralph install [DIR]                    Instala ralph globalmente
  ralph update                           Autoatualiza para a ultima release
  ralph lang current|list|set|update     Gerencia arquivos de idioma
  ralph ui current|set|toggle            Gerencia modo de UI
  --ui <modo>                            Override de UI nesta execucao

OUTROS
  ralph about                            Sobre o ralph e o autor
  ralph --version / -V                   Mostra versao
  ralph --help / -h                      Mostra esta ajuda

stdout.raw:
ralph 0.1.0-dev.1 — command-authoritative AI task runner

USAGE
  ralph <command> [options]

COMMANDS
  init                Initialize an isolated Ralph v2 workspace
  once                Execute at most one selected or eligible PRD task
  run                 Execute eligible PRD tasks with bounded orchestration
  loop                Run the same bounded orchestration through the loop spelling
  run --wiggum        Run with verified full-PRD context and bounded iterations
  status              Show workspace and event-ledger status
  status run          Show the status of a persisted execution run
  events              Read persisted run events, including JSONL output
  report last         Show the most recent run report
  report show         Show a run report selected by run ID
  doctor              Check runtime, Git, filesystem, TTY and workspace
  config explain      Explain one effective config value and source
  config list         List the effective configuration
  prd validate        Validate a v2 or classic PRD deterministically
  prd inspect         Print the typed document or recursive graph
  prd format          Canonicalize v2 task grammar without losing context
  prd migrate         Migrate a classic PRD with an explicit loss report
  providers list      List embedded provider descriptors
  providers inspect   Inspect one provider and its auth methods
  models list         List models and filter required capabilities
  models inspect      Inspect one model, limits, access and catalog source
  auth connect        Connect a credential without putting secrets in argv
  auth list           List non-secret credential references
  auth status         Check credential availability and expiry metadata
  auth revoke         Revoke and remove one credential reference
  profiles list       List independent executor and judge profiles
  profiles inspect    Inspect one resolved role profile
  profiles configure  Configure a role profile through shared CLI/form metadata
  model smoke         Make a read-only, no-tools model smoke call
  about               Describe Ralph v2 and its authority model
  version             Print the Ralph v2 version
  help                Show this help

OPTIONS
  --format human|json|jsonl        Select the output contract
  --json                           Alias for --format json
  --workspace PATH                 Use an explicit workspace directory
  --no-color                       Disable ANSI color in human output
  --debug                          Include redacted debug details on failures
  --force                          Authorize an audited override where supported; never bypass schema or child safety
  --non-interactive                Never prompt or open a UI
  --prd PATH                       Select the root PRD v2 file for execution
  --executor-profile NAME          Select the configured executor profile
  --executor-provider ID           Override only the executor provider
  --executor-model ID              Override only the executor model
  --executor-credential REF        Override only the executor credential ref
  --executor-variant ID            Override only the executor model variant
  --judge-profile NAME             Select the configured judge profile
  --judge-provider ID              Override only the judge provider
  --judge-model ID                 Override only the judge model
  --judge-credential REF           Override only the judge credential ref
  --judge-variant ID               Override only the judge model variant
  --provider ID                    Select a provider for catalog, auth or smoke
  --model ID                       Select a model where supported
  --profile ID                     Select a role profile where supported
  --credential REF                 Select a non-secret credential reference
  --method METHOD                  Select a provider-advertised authentication method
  --label TEXT                     Set a human-readable credential label
  --environment NAME               Reference an environment variable without copying it
  --secret-stdin                   Read a secret from stdin instead of prompting
  --headless                       Use an actionable headless auth flow without opening a browser
  --refresh                        Refresh remote metadata or renewable credential status
  --timeout SEC                    Set a positive timeout for auth or smoke operations
  --role executor|judge            Filter or configure a role profile
  --backend embedded|external-cli  Configure a profile backend
  --variant ID                     Select a provider-declared model variant
  --parameter NAME=VALUE           Set a provider-declared primitive model parameter; repeat as needed
  --scope global|workspace         Select the profile configuration scope
  --fallback-profile ID            Add an ordered explicit fallback; repeat as needed
  --fallback-on CLASS              Authorize a transient fallback class; repeat as needed
  --require-tools                  Require model tool-calling capability
  --require-structured-output      Require model structured-output capability
  --allow-insecure-store           Explicitly allow a warned plaintext fallback when no secure store exists
  --task ID                        Select one PRD task; once also accepts the ID positionally
  --run-id ID                      Select a resumable or persisted run where supported
  --wiggum                         Use the verified full-PRD context envelope with run
  --dry-run                        Resolve execution without backend calls or marker changes
  --fail-fast                      Stop run or loop after the first blocking task failure
  --max-tasks N                    Limit run or loop to a positive number of tasks
  --retry-delay SEC                Set a non-negative delay between retry opportunities
  --max-iterations N               Limit positive Wiggum iterations; requires effective mode wiggum
  --max-model-calls N              Limit model calls to a positive integer
  --no-change-policy POLICY        Use require-change, allow-no-change, fail-on-no-change or retry-on-no-change; legacy aliases remain accepted
  --no-change-max-retries N        Limit no-change retries to a non-negative integer
  --skip-tests                     Request applicable test gates to be skipped by policy
  --skip-lint                      Request applicable lint gates to be skipped by policy
  --skip-gates ID                  Request a named gate skip; repeat for multiple gates
  --fast                           Request every applicable allowed-to-skip verification skip
  --no-commit                      Disable optional commit creation for this execution
  --effective                      Request the effective merged config view
  --mode once|loop|wiggum          Select generic run mode; also overrides mode in config explain/list
  --ui MODE                        CLI config override used by config explain/list
  --lang LOCALE                    CLI config override used by config explain/list
  --recursive                      Compile every referenced Sub-PRD
  --strict                         Treat noncanonical warnings as validation failure
  --check                          Check formatting without writing
  --output PATH                    Write PRD output to a separate path
  --report PATH                    Select the migration report path
  --in-place                       Explicitly replace the source where supported

Ralph selects work, authorizes tools, verifies evidence and persists completion.
Models never control official task state.

  --environment NAME               Reference an environment variable without copying it
  --secret-stdin                   Read a secret from stdin instead of prompting
  --headless                       Use an actionable headless auth flow without opening a browser
  --refresh                        Refresh remote metadata or renewable credential status
  --timeout SEC                    Set a positive timeout for auth or smoke operations
  --role executor|judge            Filter or configure a role profile
  --backend embedded|external-cli  Configure a profile backend
  --variant ID                     Select a provider-declared model variant

scenarios.purpose: Record the deliberate state-layout boundary between legacy and v2 workspaces.

invariants.evidence: The command completed before timeout with exit code 0 and empty stderr.
Init emitted its expected product-specific success and identity output.
Legacy init created its required state/config/event files and PRD.
Legacy config/state are JSON objects and its generated PRD is non-empty.

stdout.raw:
Ralph v2 workspace initialized at <FIXTURE_ROOT>\init
Workspace ID: <RAW_UUID_1>
stdout.normalized:
Ralph v2 workspace initialized at <FIXTURE_ROOT>\init
Workspace ID: <UUID>

invariants.evidence: The command completed before timeout with exit code 0 and empty stderr.
Init emitted its expected product-specific success and identity output.
V2 init created the required identified SQLite layout and did not create a PRD.
workspace.json satisfies WorkspaceIdentitySchema and records the canonical fixture root.
config.yaml satisfies RalphConfigLayerSchema.
The read-only ledger parser found a workspace.initialized event for the persisted workspace ID.
events.jsonl contains the same schema-valid events as the authoritative ledger.

scenarios.rationale: Both init commands satisfy their schemas; v2 deliberately uses identified SQLite state and creates no PRD.

scenarios.purpose: Prove that v2 deliberately discovers an identified workspace in an ancestor while legacy status remains rooted at the current directory.

stdout.normalized:

invariants.evidence: The command completed before timeout with exit code 0 and empty stderr.
The parent workspace setup satisfied every init invariant before the descendant probe.
Legacy status remains uninitialized when invoked below its initialized parent.
Descendant status left the initialized tree byte-for-byte unchanged and created no nested state.

stdout.raw:
Workspace: initialized
Root:      <FIXTURE_ROOT>\status-descendant
State:     ready
ID:        <RAW_UUID_1>
Events:    1 (cursor 1)
Runs:      0
Latest:    none
stdout.normalized:
Workspace: initialized
Root:      <FIXTURE_ROOT>\status-descendant
State:     ready
ID:        <UUID>
Events:    1 (cursor 1)
Runs:      0
Latest:    none

invariants.evidence: The command completed before timeout with exit code 0 and empty stderr.
The parent workspace setup satisfied every init invariant before the descendant probe.
V2 status resolves the identified parent workspace and reports its canonical root and ID.
Descendant status left the initialized tree byte-for-byte unchanged and created no nested state.

scenarios.rationale: Both parent workspaces are valid; v2 deliberately resolves its identified ancestor while legacy remains uninitialized in the descendant.
